title: The Black Flag Waves Over the Scow
original_title: Le drapeau noir flotte sur la marmite
overview: Victor, grocer and tyrannical boss, never stops telling his family about his seafaring past, although they never believe him. When his nephew wins a model-boat contest and is commissioned to build a full-scale boat, Victor tries to make his mark.
